series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains the course curriculum, syllabus, and source documents, e.g., lesson plans, course objectives, assignments, exams, handouts, visual training aids, course attendance roster, and course evaluations, for trainings internally developed and/or presented to ODPS employees.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office component files course is superseded or obsolete. ; Electronic: in office component files course is superseded or obsolete
